post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 305

TeeHeeTM Mafia 3

"Once you teeHee down the TeeHee path, forever will it tEEhEE your TEEHEE."
- Master Yoda, probably

The Most Important Rule
Any post in this game, whether in the game thread or in private chats, must not contain any content except the following:
  • Variants Of TeeHee
    A word is a variant of 'TeeHee' if and only if it begins with a single occurrence of the letter 't', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e', followed by a single occurrence of the letter 'h', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e'. Capitalization does not matter; any letter in the word can be uppercase or lowercase.

    For example, the following are variants of the word "teehee":
    • teehee
    • teeeeeeeeeheeeeeeeee
    • tEeEhEeE
    • TEEEEEEEEHEE

    The following are not variants of the word "teehee":
    • tehee (only one 'e' between 't' and 'h')
    • teahee (misplaced 'a')
    • tee hee (space between 'tee' and 'hee')
    • TEEHHEE (two occurrences of 'h')
  • Valid Punctuation
    Punctuation is considered valid if they are placed in a way consistent to how they would be placed in a grammatically correct sentence.

    For example, the following are valid punctuation:
    • Teehee!
    • teeHee.
    • TeeHee - teehee?
    • (TEEEEEEHEEEEEE)

    The following are not considered valid punctuation:
    • - . . .... . . (Morse code is not allowed)
    • :) (emojis are not allowed)
  • Correct Quotes
    A quote is correct if and only if the body of the quote matches exactly with the full content of a previous post including formatting, and the author field is either blank or contains the exact name of the person that wrote the post. The post being quoted may be any previous post, including mod communication, votecounts, or posts that received a warning. Phantom quotes are allowed for nesting more than three quotes together.
  • BBCode and Markdown
  • Valid Votes and Night Actions
Any post that intentionally violates the spirit of this rule will receive a warning. Each post can only receive a maximum of one warning, regardless of how many times it breaks the rules. Three warnings result in a modkill.

You do not have to obey this rule within your role PM. Feel free to ask any questions you like or just vent your frustration at me for taking away your freedom of speech.

The Wish Wall
A Wish For Incoherence
Any attempt to encrypt a message in a post, even if it follows the TeeHee rule, will result in a warning. This includes but is not limited to Morse code, hexadecimal, binary, ascii art, etc.

A Wish For Providence
On any given day phase, the number of votes required to hang a player is decreased by the number of warnings they have received on that particular day. This only applies to majority vote (hammers); it is not considered for deadline hang vote-counting purposes. However, warnings from previous phases do not carry over for this purpose.

For example, if there are currently 9 players alive on day 3, then majority hang dictates that 5 votes are required to eliminate a player. However, if player A has received 2 warnings on day 3, then only 3 votes are required to hang player A that day. If player B received 1 warning on day 2 and 1 warning on day 3, then 4 votes are required to hang player B on day 3. The fact that player B received a prior warning on day 2 does not affect his elimination threshold on day 3.

All The Other Rules
All the other rules are the exact same as every other game you've ever played. There is no confirm rule.

Nothing to see here.

Go away.


Game Information
  • Phase lengths are 48 | 24. The game is Day start. There is no Dawn.
  • Majority hang is always on.
  • LyLo will never be announced, nor will votes ever be locked.
  • Cause of death is announced for all flips. Players will be informed of which faction dealt the attack, but not the necessarily the specific role (unless the faction consists of only one role).
  • Players must post at least once per Day phase, or they will be replaced. Due to the nature of the game, all posts are considered game-advancing; there is no such thing as a filler post.
  • All factions with private factional chats have daychat enabled unless otherwise specified.
  • Night actions are not compulsive unless otherwise specified.
  • All investigative results are sane.
  • Investigative roles can distinguish between negative results such as "No Visit" (meaning the check was successful, but returned nothing) and the absence of a result as indicated by the message "No Result" (meaning the check failed completely).
  • Protective roles may not consecutively self-target unless otherwise specified.
  • All roles are non-multitasking unless otherwise specified.

Setup
I make absolutely zero guarantees that this setup is balanced. Play this game at your own risk.

The setup is closed. Out of 25 players, 16 will be Town.


Alive (3)
  1. aidan0626
  2. ostriches88
  3. Scipio1

  1. mxsail (Modkilled D1, Town Odd-Night Emergency 1-Shot Vigilante) Role PM
    Your role is Town Odd-Night Emergency 1-Shot Vigilante.

    [REDACTED]

    If the first night after [REDACTED] is an odd-numbered night, you may choose a player to target on that night. You will deal a Basic Attack to your target. If you do not select a target, the action is lost; you may not save this action for future nights. This action must be submitted in this PM.

    You win when all anti-Town factions are eliminated.
  2. CoolBroCubby (Modkilled D1, Town Courtier) Role PM
    Your role is Town Courtier. Your role is intrinsically bound by the Court modifier.

Your chosen member will perform a Basic Attack on the target unless otherwise modified. This action must be submitted in the Mafia Factional Chat.

    On one night this game, you may choose a player to target. You will be informed at the end of the night of who your target visited that night, or "No Visit" if your target did not visit anyone. If your action fails, you will receive the message "No Result". This action may be submitted in either the Mafia Factional Chat or this PM.

    On one night this game, you may choose a player to target. You will be informed at the end of the night of what role your target is, along with any passive or active abilities they have. If your action fails, you will receive the message "No Result". This action may be submitted in either the Mafia Factional Chat or this PM.

    On one night this game, you may choose a player to target. You will be informed at the end of the night of everyone that visited your target that night, or "No Visits" if no one visited them. If your action fails, you will receive the message "No Result". This action may be submitted in either the Mafia Factional Chat or this PM.

    You win when all Town and all other anti-Town factions are eliminated, or when it is mechanically impossible to prevent this from happening.

    You win when all anti-Town factions are eliminated.

    Your role is Town Odd-Night Court Doctor.

    [REDACTED]

    On odd-numbered nights, you may choose a player to target. You will Heal your target from all Basic Attacks that night. This action must be submitted in this PM.

    You win when all anti-Town factions are eliminated.
  6. Eric.s.lu (Hanged D2, Town Even-Night Court Bodyguard) Role PM
    Your role is Town Even-Night Court Bodyguard.

    [REDACTED]

    On even-numbered nights, you may choose a player to target. All Visiting Attacks they receive will instead be Redirected to you, and you will also deal a Basic Attack against all incoming attackers. This action must be submitted in this PM.

    You win when all anti-Town factions are eliminated.
  7. aayr (Attacked by Mafia N2, Soulbound Gossiper) Role PM
    Your role is Soulbound Gossiper.

    Your Soulbound teammate is mhgelgi (Soulbound Doublespeaker). If your teammate dies, you will be instantly dealt an Unstoppable Attack.

    All of the text in your posts in the game thread must be enclosed in [quote] tags. When in doubt, you may ask whether your post would be valid in this PM. If you violate this rule, you will privately receive a warning, which contributes to the modkill limit.

    The first time you are hit with a Basic Attack at night, you will be Healed that night.

    You win when you survive to the end of the game.
  8. mhgelgi (Shared Fate N2, Soulbound Doublespeaker) Role PM
    Your role is Soulbound Doublespeaker.

    Your Soulbound teammate is aayr (Soulbound Gossiper). If your teammate dies, you will be instantly dealt an Unstoppable Attack.

    All of the text in your posts in the game thread must be enclosed in [hide] tags. When in doubt, you may ask whether your post would be valid in this PM. If you violate this rule, you will privately receive a warning, which contributes to the modkill limit.

    The first time you are hit with a Basic Attack at night, you will be Healed that night.

    You win when you survive to the end of the game.

    Your role is Mafia 1-Shot Executioner.

    Your Mafia teammates are [REDACTED]. You may talk to your teammates in the Mafia Factional Chat. Each night, your team may select one non-Lost member and a non-Mafia target. Your chosen member will perform a Basic Attack on the target unless otherwise modified. This action must be submitted in the Mafia Factional Chat.

    Once this game, on a night where you are chosen to carry out the factional attack, you may choose to modify this attack to also inflict Grievous Wounds upon the target. Players affected by Grievous Wounds are unable to targeted by Heal night actions. If your attack fails, the ability will still be consumed as if your action had succeeded, and you will not be able to use it again. This action may be submitted in the Mafia Factional Chat or this PM.

    You win when all Town and all other anti-Town factions are eliminated, or when it is mechanically impossible to prevent this from happening.

Socoobo wrote:
Welcome to Mafia Game 305

TeeHeeTM Mafia 3

"Once you teeHee down the TeeHee path, forever will it tEEhEE your TEEHEE."
- Master Yoda, probably

The Most Important Rule
Any post in this game, whether in the game thread or in private chats, must not contain any content except the following:
  • Variants Of TeeHee
    A word is a variant of 'TeeHee' if and only if it begins with a single occurrence of the letter 't', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e', followed by a single occurrence of the letter 'h', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e'. Capitalization does not matter; any letter in the word can be uppercase or lowercase.

    For example, the following are variants of the word "teehee":
    • teehee
    • teeeeeeeeeheeeeeeeee
    • tEeEhEeE
    • TEEEEEEEEHEE

    The following are not variants of the word "teehee":
    • tehee (only one 'e' between 't' and 'h')
    • teahee (misplaced 'a')
    • tee hee (space between 'tee' and 'hee')
    • TEEHHEE (two occurrences of 'h')
  • Valid Punctuation
    Punctuation is considered valid if they are placed in a way consistent to how they would be placed in a grammatically correct sentence.

    For example, the following are valid punctuation:
    • Teehee!
    • teeHee.
    • TeeHee - teehee?
    • (TEEEEEEHEEEEEE)

    The following are not considered valid punctuation:
    • - . . .... . . (Morse code is not allowed)
    • :) (emojis are not allowed)
  • Correct Quotes
    A quote is correct if and only if the body of the quote matches exactly with the full content of a previous post including formatting, and the author field is either blank or contains the exact name of the person that wrote the post. The post being quoted may be any previous post, including mod communication, votecounts, or posts that received a warning. Phantom quotes are allowed for nesting more than three quotes together.
  • BBCode and Markdown
  • Valid Votes and Night Actions
Any post that intentionally violates the spirit of this rule will receive a warning. Each post can only receive a maximum of one warning, regardless of how many times it breaks the rules. Three warnings result in a modkill.

You do not have to obey this rule within your role PM. Feel free to ask any questions you like or just vent your frustration at me for taking away your freedom of speech.

The Wish Wall
A Wish For Incoherence
Any attempt to encrypt a message in a post, even if it follows the TeeHee rule, will result in a warning. This includes but is not limited to Morse code, hexadecimal, binary, ascii art, etc.

A Wish For Providence
On any given day phase, the number of votes required to hang a player is decreased by the number of warnings they have received on that particular day. However, warnings from previous phases do not carry over for this purpose.

For example, if there are currently 9 players alive on day 3, then majority hang dictates that 5 votes are required to eliminate a player. However, if player A has received 2 warnings on day 3, then only 3 votes are required to hang player A that day. If player B received 1 warning on day 2 and 1 warning on day 3, then 4 votes are required to hang player B on day 3. The fact that player B received a prior warning on day 2 does not affect his elimination threshold on day 3.

All The Other Rules
All the other rules are the exact same as every other game you've ever played. There is no confirm rule.

Nothing to see here.

Go away.


Game Information
  • Phase lengths are 48 | 24. The game is Day start. There is no Dawn.
  • Majority hang is always on.
  • LyLo will never be announced, nor will votes ever be locked.
  • Cause of death is announced for all flips. Players will be informed of which faction dealt the attack, but not the necessarily the specific role (unless the faction consists of only one role).
  • Players must post at least once per Day phase, or they will be replaced. Due to the nature of the game, all posts are considered game-advancing; there is no such thing as a filler post.
  • All factions with private factional chats have daychat enabled unless otherwise specified.
  • Night actions are not compulsive unless otherwise specified.
  • All investigative results are sane.
  • Investigative roles can distinguish between negative results such as "No Visit" (meaning the check was successful, but returned nothing) and the absence of a result as indicated by the message "No Result" (meaning the check failed completely).
  • Protective roles may not consecutively self-target unless otherwise specified.
  • All roles are non-multitasking unless otherwise specified.

Setup
I make absolutely zero guarantees that this setup is balanced. Play this game at your own risk.

The setup is closed. Out of 25 players, 16 will be Town.

post_rendered:
Socoobo wrote:
Welcome to Mafia Game 305

TeeHeeTM Mafia 3

"Once you teeHee down the TeeHee path, forever will it tEEhEE your TEEHEE."
- Master Yoda, probably

The Most Important Rule
Any post in this game, whether in the game thread or in private chats, must not contain any content except the following:
  • Variants Of TeeHee
    A word is a variant of 'TeeHee' if and only if it begins with a single occurrence of the letter 't', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e', followed by a single occurrence of the letter 'h', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e'. Capitalization does not matter; any letter in the word can be uppercase or lowercase.

    For example, the following are variants of the word "teehee":
    • teehee
    • teeeeeeeeeheeeeeeeee
    • tEeEhEeE
    • TEEEEEEEEHEE

    The following are not variants of the word "teehee":
    • tehee (only one 'e' between 't' and 'h')
    • teahee (misplaced 'a')
    • tee hee (space between 'tee' and 'hee')
    • TEEHHEE (two occurrences of 'h')
  • Valid Punctuation
    Punctuation is considered valid if they are placed in a way consistent to how they would be placed in a grammatically correct sentence.

    For example, the following are valid punctuation:
    • Teehee!
    • teeHee.
    • TeeHee - teehee?
    • (TEEEEEEHEEEEEE)

    The following are not considered valid punctuation:
    • - . . .... . . (Morse code is not allowed)
    • :) (emojis are not allowed)
  • Correct Quotes
    A quote is correct if and only if the body of the quote matches exactly with the full content of a previous post including formatting, and the author field is either blank or contains the exact name of the person that wrote the post. The post being quoted may be any previous post, including mod communication, votecounts, or posts that received a warning. Phantom quotes are allowed for nesting more than three quotes together.
  • BBCode and Markdown
  • Valid Votes and Night Actions
Any post that intentionally violates the spirit of this rule will receive a warning. Each post can only receive a maximum of one warning, regardless of how many times it breaks the rules. Three warnings result in a modkill.

You do not have to obey this rule within your role PM. Feel free to ask any questions you like or just vent your frustration at me for taking away your freedom of speech.

The Wish Wall
A Wish For Incoherence
Any attempt to encrypt a message in a post, even if it follows the TeeHee rule, will result in a warning. This includes but is not limited to Morse code, hexadecimal, binary, ascii art, etc.

A Wish For Providence
On any given day phase, the number of votes required to hang a player is decreased by the number of warnings they have received on that particular day. However, warnings from previous phases do not carry over for this purpose.

For example, if there are currently 9 players alive on day 3, then majority hang dictates that 5 votes are required to eliminate a player. However, if player A has received 2 warnings on day 3, then only 3 votes are required to hang player A that day. If player B received 1 warning on day 2 and 1 warning on day 3, then 4 votes are required to hang player B on day 3. The fact that player B received a prior warning on day 2 does not affect his elimination threshold on day 3.

All The Other Rules
All the other rules are the exact same as every other game you've ever played. There is no confirm rule.

Nothing to see here.

Go away.


Game Information
  • Phase lengths are 48 | 24. The game is Day start. There is no Dawn.
  • Majority hang is always on.
  • LyLo will never be announced, nor will votes ever be locked.
  • Cause of death is announced for all flips. Players will be informed of which faction dealt the attack, but not the necessarily the specific role (unless the faction consists of only one role).
  • Players must post at least once per Day phase, or they will be replaced. Due to the nature of the game, all posts are considered game-advancing; there is no such thing as a filler post.
  • All factions with private factional chats have daychat enabled unless otherwise specified.
  • Night actions are not compulsive unless otherwise specified.
  • All investigative results are sane.
  • Investigative roles can distinguish between negative results such as "No Visit" (meaning the check was successful, but returned nothing) and the absence of a result as indicated by the message "No Result" (meaning the check failed completely).
  • Protective roles may not consecutively self-target unless otherwise specified.
  • All roles are non-multitasking unless otherwise specified.

Setup
I make absolutely zero guarantees that this setup is balanced. Play this game at your own risk.

The setup is closed. Out of 25 players, 16 will be Town.

[*][hide=Variants Of TeeHee]A word is a variant of 'TeeHee' if and only if it begins with a single occurrence of the letter 't', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e', followed by a single occurrence of the letter 'h', followed by at least two occurrences of the letter 'e'. Capitalization does not matter; any letter in the word can be uppercase or lowercase.

For example, the following are variants of the word "teehee":
[list]
[*]teehee
[*]teeeeeeeeeheeeeeeeee
[*]tEeEhEeE
[*]TEEEEEEEEHEE
[/list]

The following are [b]not[/b] variants of the word "teehee":
[list]
[*]tehee (only one 'e' between 't' and 'h')
[*]teahee (misplaced 'a')
[*]tee hee (space between 'tee' and 'hee')
[*]TEEHHEE (two occurrences of 'h')
[/list][/hide]
[*][hide=Valid Punctuation]Punctuation is considered valid if they are placed in a way consistent to how they would be placed in a grammatically correct sentence.

For example, the following are valid punctuation:
[list]
[*]Teehee!
[*]teeHee.
[*]TeeHee - teehee?
[*](TEEEEEEHEEEEEE)
[/list]

The following are [b]not[/b] considered valid punctuation:
[list]
[*]- . . .... . . (Morse code is not allowed)
[*][verbatim]:)[/verbatim] (emojis are not allowed)
[/list]
[/hide]
[*][hide=Correct Quotes]
A quote is correct if and only if the body of the quote matches exactly with the [b]full[/b] content of a previous post including formatting, and the author field is either blank or contains the exact name of the person that wrote the post. The post being quoted may be [b]any[/b] previous post, including mod communication, votecounts, or posts that received a warning. Phantom quotes are allowed for nesting more than three quotes together.
[/hide]
[*]BBCode and Markdown
[*]Valid Votes and Night Actions
[/list]
Any post that intentionally violates the spirit of this rule will receive a warning. Each post can only receive a maximum of one warning, regardless of how many times it breaks the rules. Three warnings result in a modkill.

You [b]do not[/b] have to obey this rule within your role PM. Feel free to ask any questions you like or just vent your frustration at me for taking away your freedom of speech.
[/hide]
[hide=The Wish Wall]
[hide=A Wish For Incoherence]Any attempt to encrypt a message in a post, even if it follows the TeeHee rule, will result in a warning. This includes but is not limited to Morse code, hexadecimal, binary, ascii art, etc.[/hide]
[hide=A Wish For Providence]On any given day phase, the number of votes required to hang a player is decreased by the number of warnings they have received on that particular day. However, warnings from previous phases do not carry over for this purpose.

For example, if there are currently 9 players alive on day 3, then majority hang dictates that 5 votes are required to eliminate a player. However, if player A has received 2 warnings on day 3, then only 3 votes are required to hang player A that day. If player B received 1 warning on day 2 and 1 warning on day 3, then 4 votes are required to hang player B on day 3. The fact that player B received a prior warning on day 2 does not affect his elimination threshold on day 3.[/hide]
[/hide]
[hide=All The Other Rules]
All the other rules are the exact same as every other game you've ever played. There is no confirm rule.

Nothing to see here.

Go away.
[/hide]

[hide=Game Information]
[list]
[*]Phase lengths are 48 | 24. The game is Day start. There is no Dawn.
[*]Majority hang is always on.
[*]LyLo will never be announced, nor will votes ever be locked.
[*]Cause of death is announced for all flips. Players will be informed of which [i]faction[/i] dealt the attack, but not the necessarily the specific role (unless the faction consists of only one role).
[*]Players must post at least once per Day phase, or they will be replaced. Due to the nature of the game, all posts are considered game-advancing; there is no such thing as a filler post.
[*]All factions with private factional chats have daychat enabled unless otherwise specified.
[*]Night actions are not compulsive unless otherwise specified.
[*]All investigative results are sane.
[*]Investigative roles can distinguish between negative results such as "No Visit" (meaning the check was successful, but returned nothing) and the absence of a result as indicated by the message "No Result" (meaning the check failed completely).
[*]Protective roles may not consecutively self-target unless otherwise specified.
[*]All roles are non-multitasking unless otherwise specified.
[/list]
[/hide]
[hide=Setup]
[b]I make absolutely zero guarantees that this setup is balanced. Play this game at your own risk.[/b]

The setup is closed. Out of 25 players, 16 will be [color=#2be368][b]Town[/b][/color].
[/hide]

Town King
Your role is Town King.

Your identity is known by all Town members. Non-Town players are not aware of your identity, but some may be aware of the existence of your role. If you die, all players with the Court role modifier, which includes a vast majority of the Town, will be instantly dealt an Unstoppable Attack.

You win when all anti-Town factions are eliminated.

Your role is Town Courtier. Your role is intrinsically bound by the Court modifier.

Priest Role PM
Priest
Your role is Priest.

Each night, you may choose a player to target. If your target is hanged the following day, you will be Cleansed of all negative effects and receive Healing the following night. This night action is Astral, which behaves as if it was non-visiting, meaning they cannot be seen by investigative roles, nor can they be affected by Redirect night actions. Doomsayer Role PM
Doomsayer
Your role is Doomsayer.

Each night, you may choose a player to target. If your target dies that night, everyone that visited them becomes marked by Prophecy of Doom. This night action is Astral, which behaves as if it was non-visiting, meaning they cannot be seen by investigative roles, nor can they be affected by Redirect night actions. Players that become marked are alerted by the message:
Socoobo wrote:
A dark fate awaits you. You are marked by Prophecy of Doom.
This action must be submitted in this PM.

The first time you are hit with a Basic Attack at night, you will be Healed that night.

When a player marked by Prophecy of Doom dies at night, everyone visiting this player that night becomes marked by Prophecy of Doom. When a player marked by Prophecy of Doom is hanged, everyone voting this player at the end of the day becomes marked by Prophecy of Doom.

When all living players are marked by Prophecy of Doom, you will receive permanent Immunity to all attacks. Your night action will become an Unstoppable Attack. Your attacks will become Rampaging, attacking all players that visit your target that night. You will also deal an Unstoppable Attack to all players that visit you. An announcement will be posted in the game thread when you make this transformation:
Socoobo wrote:
The Doomsayer's prophecy is complete. There lies only darkness before you.

You win when all other players are dead, or when it is mechanically impossible to prevent this outcome.
